name: Sara Worrell-Berg
funFact: I come from an Air Force family and have lived in New Mexico, Virginia, North Carolina, Texas, Florida, and Illinois. I'm happy to live in CA with my husband, Charles, and son, Macklin.

name: Dena DeBry
funFact: Even though I have always really liked keeping up with the latest technology, my undergrad and graduate degrees are in technologies that are hundreds of years old: etching, engraving and lithography.

name: Melanie Biton
funFact: I am happiest anywhere near the water. I’m always chasing the next travel adventure, looking for a great meal, and spending my spare time making things and daydreaming.

funFact: I'm learning how to compost from my super cool neighbor friend!

funFact: I love being outdoors and in nature. Along with herbs and vegetables I grow native and drought-resistant plants.
